description: Boiler efficiency dropped from 87% to 82% over 3 months; increasing coal consumption by ~12% leading to significant cost increase
root_cause: Fouling on air preheater baskets reducing heat recovery; caused by high-ash coal switched by customer without consulting Thermax
corrective_action: Cleaned air preheater; recalibrated combustion controls for new coal quality; provided coal specification advisory document to customer; recommended quarterly APH cleaning
escalated: Yes — to VP Service due to customer escalation to MD

description: Superheater tube leak during operation; boiler tripped on low drum level; 36 hours unplanned downtime during crushing season
root_cause: Fly ash erosion on SH tube bend — erosion rate higher than design due to actual ash content 18% vs design 12%
corrective_action: Emergency tube plugging; replaced 4 eroded tubes; installed erosion shields on vulnerable bends; revised maintenance schedule for monthly UT on SH tubes

description: Wrong control valve replaced during AMC visit — V-201 installed instead of V-203; caused process parameter deviation and 6-hour shutdown
root_cause: Technician relied on memory; valve tags on site faded; technician under time pressure
corrective_action: Correct valve installed; customer compensated INR 2.5L for lost production; all valve tags replaced with stainless steel permanent tags; mandatory P&ID verification step added to service work order

description: Customer ordered replacement mechanical seal for TF pump (Part# TMS-2200); received wrong seal (TMS-2100 — older model); caused 3-day delay in planned maintenance
root_cause: Warehouse shipped old model seal; inventory system not updated after model revision; no cross-reference check at dispatch
corrective_action: Correct seal air-shipped within 24 hours at Thermax cost; inventory system updated with cross-reference; old model stock quarantined for compatible installations only

description: ESP collecting efficiency only 98.2% vs guaranteed 99.5% during initial commissioning; MPCB compliance at risk
root_cause: Field 3 transformer-rectifier (TR) set has intermittent fault; rapping system timing not optimized for actual flue gas conditions
corrective_action: TR set repaired (faulty thyristor replaced); rapping sequence re-optimized through 2-day tuning exercise; achieved 99.7% efficiency in re-test

description: Customer requesting updated O&M manual reflecting modifications done during last annual maintenance (refractory relining; new soot blower configuration)
root_cause: Original O&M manual not updated after site modifications; no formal process for as-maintained documentation updates
corrective_action: Updated O&M manual delivered within 2 weeks; included all modifications with revised drawings; implemented process for automatic O&M manual update after every significant modification
